name: Mianshiya MCP Server
what_it_does: Mianshiya (面试鸭) MCP server enabling AI agents to access China's popular developer interview question platform — fetching coding interview questions, retrieving algorithm problems, accessing system design questions, and integrating Mianshiya's curated interview content into agent-driven interview preparation and technical assessment workflows.
use_cases: Fetching algorithm and coding interview questions from study preparation agents
Retrieving system design interview content from technical preparation agents
Searching topic-specific questions from coding practice agents
Building interview preparation tools from Chinese tech job market agents
Generating practice problem sets from educational agents
Validating technical interview readiness from assessment agents
not_for: Non-Chinese tech market job preparation (platform focuses on Chinese companies)
Original problem creation (curates existing questions, not for generating new ones)
Teams unfamiliar with Chinese-language content (primarily Chinese content)
best_when: A developer preparing for Chinese tech company interviews (BAT/ByteDance/Meituan etc.) needs programmatic access to Mianshiya's curated interview question database.
avoid_when: You're preparing for non-Chinese market interviews or need English-language interview resources.

auth.notes: Mianshiya account and API access required. Register at mianshiya.com. API key from account settings.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Mianshiya free tier: limited question access
pricing.paid_tiers: Mianshiya VIP: full question bank access
pricing.notes: Mianshiya has free and paid tiers. Full interview question access may require paid subscription. MCP server is free open source.

performance.rate_limits: Mianshiya API rate limits — see platform documentation

known_agent_gotchas: Platform and documentation primarily in Chinese — limited English support
API access may require paid Mianshiya subscription for full content
Content focused on Chinese tech companies — less relevant for Western interviews
Community MCP from yuyuanweb — limited maintenance and documentation
Rate limits not clearly documented — monitor for 429 responses
Question availability depends on subscription tier
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. API key required — store as environment variable. China-hosted platform — consider data residency. Community MCP. No sensitive user data beyond authentication.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. API key auth. China-hosted platform. Community MCP.
